title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: rig bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for rig is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: Rig is a utility designed to watch or monitor specific system resources (e.g. log files, journals, system activity, etc...) and then take specific action when the trigger condition is met. Its primary aim is to assist in troubleshooting and data collection for randomly occurring events.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): rig uses old sosreport command - [rhel-9.7.0-z] (JIRA:RHEL-131182)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
full_text:
An update for rig is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Rig is a utility designed to watch or monitor specific system resources (e.g. log files, journals, system activity, etc...) and then take specific action when the trigger condition is met. Its primary aim is to assist in troubleshooting and data collection for randomly occurring events.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): rig uses old sosreport command - [rhel-9.7.0-z] (JIRA:RHEL-131182)
